source.quote: Never add sensitive information (API keys, internal URLs, credentials, private infrastructure details) here.

statement: CLAUDE.md is committed to a public OSS repository, so sensitive information such as API keys, internal URLs, credentials, and private infrastructure details must not be added to it.
directives: Forbid writes to CLAUDE.md that carry sensitive API keys, credentials, internal URLs, or private infrastructure details.
Allow non-sensitive guidance edits and redacted placeholders in CLAUDE.md.
